description.value: The mind-summons perfected. You Interact with an object at a distance — up to 120 feet, through walls and barriers: seize it, drag it to your hand, shove it, turn a wheel, throw a bolt. Call the Blade now works anywhere on the scene, and you can Disarm or Shove a creature at range with the telekinetic grip (Athletics vs. Reflex DC). Creatures holding an object otherwise keep their grip.
